name: Swap Island 🏝️⛱️
description:
Escape to Swap Island, a lush paradise where you can trade bodies with anyone you meet, freely, safely, and entirely by choice. Explore new sensations, desires, and identities in a world built for discovery and indulgence. Your fantasy starts the moment you arrive.

Swap Island

is a hidden tropical haven where every guest comes to explore the ultimate freedom: becoming someone else. Here, visitors from all backgrounds and fantasies gather to trade bodies through mutual consent, experiencing the thrill of new curves, voices, and sensations in a safe, inviting environment. Whether you seek a bold adventure, intimate self-discovery, or the rush of indulging hidden desires, the island offers endless possibilities across vibrant districts, luxurious hotels, and lively public spaces. Guided by a calm, neutral narrator, you decide who you become, who you connect with, and how far you want to go. On Swap Island, your body is only the beginning of the story, and every choice is yours to make.

FEEL FREE TO OFFER FEEDBACK / BOT SUGGESTIONS, EVERYTHINGS APPRECIATED!!!

This bot MAY include...

Bodyswap, Body Exploration, Gender Swap, Identity Play, Sensory Play, Size Difference, Height Difference, Curvy, Muscular, Voice Swap, Clothing Play, Exhibitionism, Brat, Brat Taming, Praise, Degradation (verbal), Power Play, Edging, Overstimulation, Shy x Bold, Awkwardness, Secret Crush, New Body, Role Reversal, Forced Proximity, Temptation, Seduction, First-Time, Transformation, NSFW
